title: P0-PGR Execution Receipt v1
description: Receipt for a real (non-shadow) packet execution. Added 2026-07-08 after the M03 audit found execution receipts had no schema (additive brake, L5-compliant). Provenance rules: timestamps machine-generated at write time, external claims backed by stored artifacts, never prose.

executed_at.description: Machine-generated at execution start — never hand-typed. Must not predate any input it depends on (queue, packet created_at).

recorded_at.description: Machine-generated at receipt write time; verifiers compare this to file mtime.

executor_route_note.description: If actual executor differs from the packet's declared delivery_route/target_executor, say so and why.

founder_authorization_ref.description: Path to the in-repo founder authorization/unlock receipt that permits real execution. Chat approval alone is not evidence; record it first (receipts/p0pgr/founder/).

evidence_artifacts.description: Stored proof, not prose. For external fetches: one entry per URL with status + body hash + saved artifact path under receipts/p0pgr/artifacts/<receipt-id>/.

accounting_note.description: If analysis was LLM-authored inside a session, say so — session-cost vs metered-API-cost distinction, never a bare implausible $0
